era_context: Identical to 2060–2061 BCE: Old Kingdom Egypt in advanced decline, Akkad collapsed, Ur III consolidating in southern Mesopotamia, Harappan civilization mature, traditional Xia Dynasty (unconfirmed).
disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified. No specific events are attested for this year.
historiographic_note: 2062 BCE falls within a period for which no year-specific events are documented in surviving sources. The broader era context (Old Kingdom decline, Ur III emergence, Harappan maturity) applies, but no individual events can be assigned to this year with confidence. This is typical for most ancient years: the historical record is too sparse to support year-by-year granularity. The absence of events here is not a gap in research but an honest reflection of the sources.
